task_description:
设计一个"无畏契约战绩分析"网页的主页。这是一个网站主页设计，用于展示游戏《无畏契约（Valorant）》玩家的战绩分析。

设计要求：
1. 顶部导航栏：Logo "无畏契约战绩分析"、导航菜单（首页、数据分析、排行榜、关于）、用户账户区
2. 大型主视觉区：品牌标题、副标题说明、CTA按钮（立即分析）、游戏背景或角色图片
3. 核心功能区：卡片展示 3-4 个主要功能（玩家查询、战绩统计、英雄胜率、段位排行等）
4. 数据展示区：示例数据可视化或数据洞察卡片
5. 底部：Footer，包含链接、社交媒体、版权信息

设计风格：
- 采用无畏契约游戏的黑色、红色、白色配色方案
- 现代极简设计，科技感强
- 响应式布局，美观专业

请保存设计图到 ~/Desktop/valorant_design.png

【重要】保存文件时必须使用实际路径：/Users/lzz/Desktop，禁止用 /Users/xxx/ 或 $(whoami)。

params.code:
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw, ImageFont
import os

# 创建画布 (1920x1080 全屏设计)
width, height = 1920, 1080
img = Image.new('RGB', (width, height), color='#0a0a0a')  # 深黑色背景
draw = ImageDraw.Draw(img)

# 颜色定义
COLOR_BLACK = '#0a0a0a'
COLOR_DARK_GRAY = '#1a1a1a'
COLOR_RED = '#ff4655'  # Valorant 红色
COLOR_ACCENT_RED = '#ff5566'
COLOR_WHITE = '#ffffff'
COLOR_LIGHT_GRAY = '#e0e0e0'
COLOR_DARK_TEXT = '#888888'

# ========== 尝试加载字体，如果失败使用默认字体 ==========
try:
    font_title = ImageFont.truetype("/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc", 72)
    font_heading = ImageFont.truetype("/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc", 48)
    font_subheading = ImageFont.truetype("/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc", 32)
    font_normal = ImageFont.truetype("/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc", 24)
    font_small = ImageFont.truetype("/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc", 18)
except:
    font_title = ImageFont.load_default()
    font_heading = ImageFont.load_default()
    font_subheading = ImageFont.load_default()
    font_normal = ImageFont.load_default()
    font_small = ImageFont.load_default()

# ========== 1. 顶部导航栏 ==========
navbar_height = 80
draw.rectangle([(0, 0), (width, navbar_height)], fill=COLOR_BLACK, outline=COLOR_RED, width=2)

# Logo
draw.text((60, 20), "Ⓥ VALORANT STATS", fill=COLOR_RED, font=font_heading)

# 导航菜单
menu_items = ["首页", "数据分析", "排行榜", "关于"]
menu_x = 900
for item in menu_items:
    draw.text((menu_x, 30), item, fill=COLOR_LIGHT_GRAY, font=font_normal)
    menu_x += 200

# 用户账户区
draw.rectangle([(1600, 20), (1850, 60)], fill=COLOR_RED, outline=COLOR_RED, width=2)
draw.text((1650, 25), "登录", fill=COLOR_WHITE, font=font_normal)

# ========== 2. Hero 区（主视觉） ==========
hero_y_start = navbar_height
hero_y_end = 500

# Hero 背景渐变效果（用矩形堆叠模拟）
for i in range(hero_y_end - hero_y_start):
    color_intensity = int(20 + (i / (hero_y_end - hero_y_start)) * 40)
    color = f'#{color_intensity:02x}{color_intensity:02x}{color_intensity:02x}'
    draw.line([(0, hero_y_start + i), (width, hero_y_start + i)], fill=color, width=1)

# Hero 左侧内容
hero_content_x = 80
hero_title_y = 200

draw.text((hero_content_x, hero_title_y), "无畏契约战绩分析", fill=COLOR_RED, font=font_title)
draw.text((hero_content_x, hero_title_y + 100), "实时追踪您的游戏表现 · 深度数据洞察", fill=COLOR_LIGHT_GRAY, font=font_subheading)

# CTA 按钮
button_width, button_height = 300, 60
button_x, button_y = hero_content_x, hero_title_y + 200
draw.rectangle([(button_x, button_y), (button_x + button_width, button_y + button_height)], 
               fill=COLOR_RED, outline=COLOR_RED, width=3)
draw.text((button_x + 50, button_y + 12), "立即分析", fill=COLOR_WHITE, font=font_heading)

# ========== 3. 核心功能区（卡片） ==========
functions_y = 530
card_width, card_height = 400, 280
card_gap = 60

functions = [
    {"title": "玩家查询", "desc": "输入游戏ID查询\n完整战绩数据", "icon": "👤"},
    {"title": "战绩统计", "desc": "对阵历史统计\n胜率趋势分析", "icon": "📊"},
    {"title": "英雄胜率", "desc": "各角色表现排行\n最强英雄推荐", "icon": "⭐"},
    {"title": "段位排行", "desc": "全服玩家排名\n段位竞速榜", "icon": "🏆"}
]

card_x_positions = [60, 520, 980, 1440]

for idx, func in enumerate(functions):
    card_x = card_x_positions[idx]
    
    # 卡片背景
    draw.rectangle([(card_x, functions_y), (card_x + card_width, functions_y + card_height)],
                   fill=COLOR_DARK_GRAY, outline=COLOR_RED, width=2)
    
    # 卡片顶部红色条
    draw.rectangle([(card_x, functions_y), (card_x + card_width, functions_y + 8)],
                   fill=COLOR_RED, outline=COLOR_RED)
    
    # 图标
    draw.text((card_x + 30, functions_y + 30), func["icon"], fill=COLOR_RED, font=font_heading)
    
    # 标题
    draw.text((card_x + 30, functions_y + 100), func["title"], fill=COLOR_RED, font=font_subheading)
    
    # 描述
    draw.text((card_x + 30, functions_y + 170), func["desc"], fill=COLOR_LIGHT_GRAY, font=font_normal)

# ========== 4. 数据展示区 ==========
data_section_y = 850

# 标题
draw.text((80, data_section_y), "实时数据洞察", fill=COLOR_RED, font=font_heading)

# 数据卡片
data_items = [
    {"label": "平均K/D", "value": "1.24"},
    {"label": "总场次", "value": "284"},
    {"label": "胜率", "value": "56%"},
    {"label": "最高分段", "value": "钻石2"}
]

data_card_width = 350
data_x_start = 80

for idx, item in enumerate(data_items):
    data_x = data_x_start + idx * (data_card_width + 40)
    data_y = data_section_y + 80
    
    # 数据卡片背景
    draw.rectangle([(data_x, data_y), (data_x + data_card_width, data_y + 100)],
                   fill=COLOR_DARK_GRAY, outline=COLOR_ACCENT_RED, width=1)
    
    # 标签
    draw.text((data_x + 30, data_y + 10), item["label"], fill=COLOR_DARK_TEXT, font=font_small)
    
    # 数值（大）
    draw.text((data_x + 30, data_y + 40), item["value"], fill=COLOR_RED, font=font_heading)

# ========== 5. Footer ==========
footer_y = height - 100

# Footer 背景
draw.rectangle([(0, footer_y), (width, height)], fill=COLOR_BLACK, outline=COLOR_RED, width=2)

# Footer 内容 - 左侧链接
footer_links = "关于我们 | 使用条款 | 隐私政策 | 联系我们"
draw.text((80, footer_y + 20), footer_links, fill=COLOR_LIGHT_GRAY, font=font_small)

# Footer 内容 - 右侧社交
social = "Facebook  Twitter  Discord  YouTube"
draw.text((1200, footer_y + 20), social, fill=COLOR_LIGHT_GRAY, font=font_small)

# Footer 底部版权
copyright = "© 2026 无畏契约战绩分析 | All Rights Reserved"
draw.text((width // 2 - 300, footer_y + 55), copyright, fill=COLOR_DARK_TEXT, font=font_small)

# 保存图片
output_path = '/Users/lzz/Desktop/valorant_design.png'
img.save(output_path)
print(f'✓ 设计图已保存到: {output_path}')
print(f'✓ 分辨率: {width}x{height}')
print(f'✓ 配色: 黑色 + Valorant红色 + 白色')
print(f'✓ 包含: 导航栏 | Hero区 | 功能卡片 | 数据展示 | Footer')
